summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of the redesigned invoice PDF preview on /gratis-factuur page (PublicInvoiceGenerator). All 8 features tested and working correctly. The modern geometric design with diagonal shapes in header/footer, two-column layout, colored table headers, and accent-colored total bar is implemented correctly.

features_tested.feature: Invoice preview renders with geometric header shapes
features_tested.notes: Diagonal shapes using CSS clip-path visible in header - teal primary color with orange accent shape
Modern (teal/orange), Zakelijk (blue), Creatief (purple/pink), Krachtig (red/amber), Natuur (green) - all apply correct colors to header, footer, table header, total bar
Company name, address, contact info, bank details, customer details all render in preview

features_tested.feature: BTW calculations and totals display correctly
features_tested.notes: Subtotal (1000) + BTW 10% (100) = Total 1100 for 5 items x 200
PDF generated and downloaded as 'factuur-FAC-2026-001.pdf' using html2canvas + jsPDF
Print button visible and clickable (calls window.print())
SRD (SRD 1.100,00), EUR (€ 1.100,00), USD ($ 1,100.00) all format correctly
SR (10%), NL (21%), Geen (no BTW) all update calculations correctly - Geen BTW hides BTW row

additional_tests.notes: Items can be added with Toevoegen button, calculations update correctly for multiple items
Switching to Offerte changes badge to OFFERTE, number prefix to OFF-, and date label to 'Geldig tot'
Footer shows diagonal shapes matching header design with 'Bedankt voor uw vertrouwen!' message
Shows initials (VE) when no logo uploaded, with white background in header

design_verification.geometric_header: CSS clip-path creates diagonal accent shape (40% width) with triangle detail
design_verification.two_column_layout: Left panel (form) and right panel (preview) correctly laid out with xl:col-span-5 and xl:col-span-7
design_verification.colored_table_headers: Table headers use template primaryColor background with white text
design_verification.accent_total_bar: Total bar uses template accentColor (orange for Modern) with white text
design_verification.teal_emerald_theme: Modern template uses #0d9488 (teal) and #f97316 (orange) matching landing page colors

critical_code_review_comments: Geometric design implemented correctly using CSS clip-path for diagonal shapes
Templates array properly configured with primaryColor and accentColor for two-tone designs
Calculations for subtotal, BTW, and total are accurate
PDF generation uses html2canvas and jsPDF as specified
All form inputs and preview updates work with real-time live preview
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invoice PDF preview redesign fully tested on /gratis-factuur page. Modern geometric design with diagonal shapes, 5 color templates, currency switching (SRD/EUR/USD), BTW region switching (SR/NL/Geen), PDF download, and Factuur/Offerte document types all working correctly. Page URL: https://vastgoed-admin-v2.preview.emergentagent.com/gratis-factuur
